families.subject_phrase: a Nordic alien — a tall, slender HUMAN-LIKE humanoid person with smooth pale human skin, long straight platinum-blonde hair, calm serene human facial features, two arms and two legs and a human body plan, wearing a simple plain pale bodysuit; a person, absolutely NOT an ape, monkey, gorilla, or any furry animal

poses.pose_phrase: standing serenely, upright, arms at its sides
